name: dashy
description: Dashy — a self-hosted dashboard for hosting standalone static web apps.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix server run test:e2e
